name: Jumping Heavy Kick
notes: Can be used as a fuzzy instant overhead vs. JP/Marisa/Zangief (opponent must be in Burnout for true blockstring); lower body projectile invuln 8-19f and 8-25f on kicking leg (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

name: Neutral Jump Heavy Kick
notes: Hits on both sides, preventing the opponent from walking under for a punish; useful air-to-air; lower body projectile invuln 8-19f and 8-25f on kicking legs (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

name: Wall Jump
notes: Counter-hit state during entire duration; can be done from Back or Neutral jump if fully against the wall, or after Forward Jump against a cornered opponent

name: Soaring Eagle Punches
notes: Can be performed on whiff; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state

name: Yoso Kick 2
notes: Cancelable into itself on hit/block (up to 3 total uses) or into other air moves; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; can hit cross-up (bounces away from wall if opponent is fully cornered)

name: Yoso Kick 3
notes: Cancelable into other air moves on hit/block but cannot chain into any further Yoso Kicks; causes spike knockdown vs. airborne opponents; can hit cross-up (bounces away from wall if opponent is fully cornered)

name: Serenity Stream Exit
notes: Input 214P again to manually exit stance (fastest total Serenity Stream time is 37f); cannot block while exiting stance; counter-hit state for entire animation; final 14f of recovery is in a standing state; 18f version occurs automatically after 14+57f (can delay by holding crouch); when Stance Exit occurs automatically after LP/LK/MK stance attacks, the total exit duration is increased and Chun can stand block before the final 18f recovery period

name: Orchid Palm
notes: No charge required to cancel into Kikoken or Spinning Bird Kick; [] refers to recovery when exiting Serenity Stream; slight low profile for entire move duration; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 4th active frame; on Perfect Parry, Chun-Li is forced to exit the stance (2f less total recovery on PP) and is in a Punish Counter state during the entire stance exit animation; when automatically transitioning into Stance Exit, Chun-Li can block for the first 2 transition frames (except on Perfect Parry)

name: Snake Strike
range_notes: Slides forward; Range 1.75 on 1st active frame
notes: Low profile/upper body projectile invuln: 1-31f (exit stance) / 1-36f (remain crouched); extra-low profile 8-21f (can even go under Drive Impact); [] refers to recovery when exiting Serenity Stream; () refers to KD Adv. when exiting Serenity Stream on hit; on Perfect Parry, Chun-Li is forced to exit the stance and is in a Punish Counter state during the entire stance exit animation (1f worse PP disadvantage if she holds downback); the final active frame does not move forward (can only achieve the highest frame advantage with meaty timing, not with spacing)

name: Lotus Fist
notes: No charge required to cancel into Kikoken or Spinning Bird Kick; exits Serenity Stream upon use; only first hit is an overhead; 1-2f low profile, 1-5f crouching state; 29-42f no head hurtbox

name: Forward Strike
notes: No charge required to cancel into Kikoken or Spinning Bird Kick; [] refers to recovery when exiting Serenity Stream; on Perfect Parry, Chun-Li is forced to exit the stance (5f less total recovery on PP) and is in a Punish Counter state during the entire stance exit animation; when automatically transitioning into Stance Exit, Chun-Li can block for the first 5 transition frames (except on Perfect Parry)

name: Senpu Kick
notes: No charge required to cancel into Kikoken or Spinning Bird Kick; [] refers to recovery when exiting Serenity Stream; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 4th active frame; on Perfect Parry, Chun-Li is forced to exit the stance (6f less total recovery on PP) and is in a Punish Counter state during the entire stance exit animation; when automatically transitioning into Stance Exit, Chun-Li can block for the first 6 transition frames (except on Perfect Parry)

name: Tenku Kick
notes: Jump cancelable on hit only; puts opponent into limited juggle state; exits Serenity Stream upon use; 1-6f crouching state

name: Parry Drive Rush
notes: See Drive Rush; 1-bar version performed out of a Parry; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation (if performed immediately after a successful Parry, only 1+8 startup); the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties; Distance: 1.044 (min/throw), 2.222 (min/block), 3.163 (max/final DR frame)

name: Drive Rush Cancel
notes: See Drive Rush; 3-bar version performed on hit/block from a cancelable normal; can also be performed on whiff from cancelable light normals; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation; the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties

name: Kikoken
notes: 50f charge (charge lasts 10f after releasing back direction); no charge required if canceled from Stance normals; travels ~90% screen; Super cancel timing is very strict

name: Kikoken
notes: 50f charge (charge lasts 10f after releasing back direction); no charge required if canceled from Stance normals; travels ~80% screen; Super cancel timing is very strict

name: Kikoken
notes: 50f charge (charge lasts 10f after releasing back direction); no charge required if canceled from Stance normals; travels ~60% screen; Super cancel timing is very strict

name: Kikoken
notes: 45f charge (charge lasts 10f after releasing back direction); no charge required if canceled from Stance normals; 2-hit projectile; counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies after both hits; 2nd hit with higher juggle limit only comes out if 1st hit connects

name: Lightning Kick Barrage
notes: () refers to scaled damage from 236KK combo starter; 10 hits total; does not cost additional Drive meter; cannot hit cross-up

name: Spinning Bird Kick
notes: 30f charge time (charge lasts 12f after releasing down direction); no charge required if canceled from Stance normals; combos from light normals; cannot hit cross-up

name: Spinning Bird Kick
notes: 30f charge time (charge lasts 12f after releasing down direction); no charge required if canceled from Stance normals; combos from medium normals; cannot hit cross-up

name: Spinning Bird Kick
notes: 30f charge time (charge lasts 12f after releasing down direction); no charge required if canceled from Stance normals; combos from 2HP, 4HP, 2MP, 5MK, Stance HP, and Stance MK; cannot hit cross-up

name: Spinning Bird Kick
notes: 30f charge time (charge lasts 12f after releasing down direction); no charge required if canceled from Stance normals; puts opponent into limited juggle state (juggle follow-up only possible vs. grounded opponents); combos from medium normals; cannot hit cross-up

name: Neutral Taunt
notes: "Sorry!"; Punish Counter crumple is the only way to keep it safe, but does not allow follow-up combo

name: Forward Taunt
notes: "Welcome!"

name: Back Taunt
notes: "Yawn... are you ready yet?"
